title: fraxinus oxycarpa var. angustifolia
intro: Fraxinus oxycarpa var. angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved Manchurian ash, is a deciduous tree species native to East Asia. The bark and leaves of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Fraxinus oxycarpa var. angustifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
